description: Natural Vitality CALM Gummies are a convenient, delicious magnesium supplement to help support a balanced mood and a healthy response to stress (1). Natural CALM magnesium supplements help support over 300 cellular processes in your body, including maintaining cardiovascular health, brain and nervous system function, and healthy bones and muscles (1). Help manage stress, release tension from your body, and calm your mind with these chewable magnesium supplements (1). Vegan, gluten-free ingredients combine in these magnesium citrate gummies to create a flavorful raspberry lemon taste. CALM Natural Vitality magnesium supplements contain no artificial flavor or synthetic color. (1) These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
features: DIETARY SUPPLEMENT: One bottle of 240 Natural Vitality CALM Gummies Magnesium Citrate Supplement, designed to help support a balanced mood and a healthy response to stress (1)
SUPPORT BALANCED MOOD: Formulated with magnesium citrate, these chewable magnesium supplements help manage stress, release tension and calm your mind (1)
MAGNESIUM CITRATE: An essential mineral, magnesium citrate supports over 300 cellular processes in your body, including heart and brain function (1)
INGREDIENTS: Organic cane sugar, organic tapioca syrup and natural flavors combine to create tasty raspberry lemon-flavored magnesium gummies
VEGAN AND GLUTEN-FREE: Natural CALM magnesium supplements are vegan, gluten-free and made without artificial flavor or synthetic color
DAILY SUPPLEMENT: Adults and teens may chew up to 4 vegan magnesium gummies every day to promote a healthy stress response and balanced mood (1)
FOR MAXIMIZING REST AND RELAXATION: Since 1982, Natural Vitality CALM has been providing stress relief and relaxation as well as sleep support through the power of magnesium sourced from the sea (1)
HEALTHY AND HAPPY LIVING: Natural Vitality has a commitment to calmfulness, equality and holistic sustainability, which helps to make products that make life easier and lessen stress in your life
BEST SELLING: Natural Vitality has the best-selling magnesium supplement in the natural products market (2) (2) (March 2022 Volume sales data for Natural Products market as defined by SPINS)
parentTitle: Natural Vitality Natural Vitality Calm Plus Calcium
title: Natural Vitality Calm Magnesium Gummies | 330mg Per Serving | Raspberry Lemon Flavored Supplement | Gluten-Free & Vegan | 240 Count
